ab: pakamaanay kiso a talatalo’an?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: pakapalidingay kako a talatalo’an.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: pakamaanay cingra a tayra i paisingan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: rakat sanay cingra a tayra i paisingan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: pakamaanay kiso a tayra i Penghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pakahikokiay kako a tayra i Penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: pakamaanay kiso a tayra i Penghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pakataminaay kako a tayra i Penghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: pakamaanay kiso a minokay?
en: How do you go home?

ab: paka捷運nay kako a minokay.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: pakamaanay ci Panay a talapitilidan?
en: How does Panay go to school?

ab: pakacinamalay ci Panay a talapitilidan.
en: Panay goes to school by train.

ab: pakamaanay ci Kacaw a talakiwkay?
en: How does Kacaw go to church?

ab: pakakoliciway ci Kacaw a talakiwkay.
en: Kacaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: paka捷運nay kiso a talapitilidan han?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: cowa, pakapasuay kako a talapitilidan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: pakakoliciway kiso a talapitilidan han?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Hai, pakakoliciway kako a talapitilidan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: paka高鐵ay kiso a talaTakaw han?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Hai, paka高鐵ay kako a talaTakaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: pakacinamalay anca pakahikokiay kiso a talaPosong han?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: pakahikokiay, pakahikokiay ko kalikiay to pakacinamalay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: pakapasuay anca pakapalidingay kiso a talakiwkay han?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: pakapalidingay kako a talakiwkay, pakapalidingay ko calowayay to pakapasuay.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: mangataay no patiyamay ko loma’ namo han?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: cowa kangata, pakaotopayay to kako a tayra i patiyamay.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: mangataay no pitilidan ko yofing han?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: mangataay, rakat han tahira to.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: mangataay no siyataw ko kakomaenan han?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: masadak nani siyataw maedeng lima a fun ko rarakaten tahira to.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
